modmenu.descriptionTranslation.copycoord: CopyCoords is a client-side Fabric mod that makes coordinates faster to copy, convert, and share.
option.copycoords.copyToClipboard@Toolti: Whether /copycoords copies your coordinates to the system clipboard after sending the chat message.
option.copycoords.copyConvertedToClipboa: Whether /convertcoords copies your converted coordinates to the system clipboard.
option.copycoords.showDimensionInCoordin: If enabled, the dimension (Overworld, Nether, End) will be shown when copying coordinates.
option.copycoords.coordinateFormat@Toolt: Choose how coordinates are displayed: Space (100 64 200), Bracket ([100, 64, 200]), or XYZ (X:100 Y:64 Z:200).
option.copycoords.coordinateTemplate@Too: Enter a custom coordinate format. Placeholders: {x}, {y}, {z}, {dimension}, {dimName}. Leave empty to use the selected format above. Preview shown when editing.
option.copycoords.pasteToChatInput@Toolt: If enabled, copied coordinates will be placed into the chat input box instead of sending or copying.
option.copycoords.instantChatEnabled@Too: If enabled, /cc and /copycoords also send their coordinate output to server chat.
option.copycoords.showInstantChatSendUnb: Show instant send key unbound hint
If enabled, shows a one-time chat hint when Instant Chat Send key is unbound.
option.copycoords.chatCoordinateDetectio: If enabled, CopyCoords scans incoming chat messages for coordinate triples and shows a follow-up action line.
Max detected coordinate sets per message
Limits how many detected coordinate action lines CopyCoords will show for a single incoming message.
message.copycoords.command.no_player: Cannot read position – no player loaded.
message.copycoords.command.copy_failed: Failed to copy coordinates to clipboard: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.copied_with_d: Copied coordinates with dimension to clipboard: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.failed: Failed to copy coordinates to clipboard: %s
message.copycoords.instant_chat_send_unb: [CopyCoords] Instant Chat Send is unbound. Bind a key in Controls to use it.
message.copycoords.command.unknown_goal: Unknown goal dimension: %s (use overworld or nether)
message.copycoords.command.unsupported_d: Cannot convert coordinates in this dimension (only Overworld and Nether are supported).
